files.reason: Centralized exception-to-Problem-Details mapping must not regress into leaking unsafe details.
Request classification controls whether centralized Problem Details handling is applied.
Current actor resolution feeds audit attribution for HTTP requests.
Security header emission is part of the HTTP hardening surface.
Security header registration/configuration is part of the HTTP hardening surface.
Forwarded header configuration affects proxy trust boundaries and request identity.
Rate limiting protects request-processing surfaces from abuse.
Persistence string canonicalization protects storage normalization behavior.
Lookup/display string normalization protects persistence comparison behavior.
Save hooks apply auditing, canonicalization, timestamp normalization, and concurrency behavior.
